conversation.content: Make a plain that can fly in entire map

steps.description: Construct a basic plane model in Workspace consisting of a Body, Wings, and a VehicleSeat. Add an Attachment and both LinearVelocity and AngularVelocity objects to the PrimaryPart for physics-based flight. Ensure the plane is unanchored.
Create a RemoteEvent named 'PlaneInput' in ReplicatedStorage to facilitate client-to-server communication for flight controls.

Develop a server-side script in ServerScriptService that listens to the 'PlaneInput' RemoteEvent. It should update the LinearVelocity (for thrust/speed) and AngularVelocity (for pitch/roll/yaw) of the plane based on inputs provided by the client.

Create a LocalScript in StarterPlayerScripts that detects when the player sits in the Plane's VehicleSeat. While seated, capture WASD and Shift/Ctrl inputs to send throttle and steering data to the server via the 'PlaneInput' RemoteEvent.
Create a ScreenGui in StarterGui with a speedometer and basic flight instructions (e.g., 'W/S for Pitch, A/D for Roll, Shift to Throttle') that appears only when the player is piloting the plane.
